description: CompositionGreen and white striped shirt made of 100% cotton, engineered with Autopress quality, has a spread collar, a buttoned front placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, fine stitches - SPI 16 on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, box pleat at the back and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water in a gentle cycle inside out, using a high quality detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowLine dry inside out in shadeWarm steam iron do not iron on decorationsThis striped shirt from arrow's Premium Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering formal silhouette, making for an easy addition to your wardrobe. The Autopress quality helps keep the shirt wrinkle free so no need to iron. Team it with crisp formal pants and a blazer ans add on leather shoes and classy accessories for that perfect formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'11& rdquo and shoulders 17.5"
